rationale: Initial Discovery pass: 6 proper nouns enumerated (GitHub, username, pinned repos, contribution streak, most-used language, 90-day commit activity), 11 assumptions, 6 inflection points (auth/PAT marked high-importance with evidence-backed action), 10 first-contact requirements, 12 OOS items. Telos: single-screen profile-card lookup tool, static web page on Windows.

Inline GitHub-API citations probe per INLINE-mode instructions — captures the 7 canonical docs.github.com references that Discovery already gathered in IP1, making them addressable as citations_pointer targets for assertions sourced as canonical_evidence.

Interface contract for api-client's fetchProfilePayload export consumed by data-derivers — full ProfilePayload shape (user, pinned_repos, contribution_calendar_year, owned_non_fork_repos_with_languages), 5 typed error classes, invariants for missing-PAT degraded path.
Interface contract — card-renderer consumes the same fetchProfilePayload shape directly for avatar/name/handle/pinned-repo display (no derivation pass-through layer).

Interface contract for the three pure derivation functions: computeCurrentStreak, computeMostUsedLanguage, sliceLast90Days. Documents purity, determinism, tie-breaking, and the 90-cell padding invariant.

DOM-plus-module contract — ui-shell owns the form/status DOM and the error_type to UI message mapping; api-client owns all network and error taxonomy. Single direction of dependency keeps the network boundary clean.

Five-section breakdown: api-client, data-derivers, ui-shell, card-renderer, edge-case-testing (depends_on includes integrator pseudo-node). 22 machine-checkable assertions, 47 discovery-coverage assertions (telos + restatement + 11 assumptions + 6 inflection points + 6 proper nouns + 10 first-contact requirements + 12 OOS items), 1 prompt-named-verb assertion (PNV.1, verb='shows'). All external-system claims sourced as canonical_evidence with citations_pointer to probe-quick-github-api findings.
TD initial-pass completion report per v1.11 schema; 4 plain-language blurbs, next_role=Editor.

Editor structural audit complete. Verdict: pass_with_recommendations. All five checks (proper_noun_citation, discovery_high_importance_action, td_ip_source, first_contact_coverage, telos_coherence) pass substantively. Two low-severity findings: (F.1) ledger PN.1–PN.6 remain verification_status: pending although TD covered them via canonical_evidence + citations_pointer to probe-quick-github-api/findings.json — recommend annotating ledger as verified_by_alternate_route for downstream legibility; (F.2) DCA.PN2 source could be upgraded from td_plan to canonical_evidence with citations_pointer to C.5/C.3. No routing required; passes to Coordinator.
5 sections + integrator pseudo-node across 5 waves; data-derivers and api-client run in wave 1 (no deps between them).
api-client implementation: GraphQL + REST GitHub client with typed errors.
data-derivers implementation: computeCurrentStreak, computeMostUsedLanguage, sliceLast90Days pure functions.
card-renderer implementation: renderCard with header, pinned, stats, heatmap; XSS-safe textContent.
All builder outputs merged into deliverable layout per sections-v1.json#deliverable_layout.
Static checks + pure-function derivers tests executed under Node.
All sections verified, integrator merged, edge-case-testing executed.
